phrases.intent_en: Ask about tickets to the summit
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais un billet pour le sommet, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DREH uhn bee-YEH poor luh soh-MEH, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Book summit tickets online weeks in advance — they sell out fast. The summit is accessible only by elevator from the 2nd floor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about taking the stairs vs. elevator
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut monter par les escaliers ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn puh mohn-TAY par layz es-kah-LYAY
phrases.cultural_note: You can climb the stairs to the 1st and 2nd floors (674 steps to the 2nd). Stair tickets are cheaper and the line is usually shorter. The summit requires the elevator.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the champagne bar at the top
phrases.text_local: Où est le bar à champagne au sommet ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh BAR ah shahm-PAHN-yuh oh soh-MEH
phrases.cultural_note: The champagne bar is at the very top of the tower. A glass costs around 15-20 euros — expensive, but the view is unbeatable.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which level has the best view
phrases.text_local: Quel étage a la plus belle vue ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ay-TAHZH ah lah ploo bel VOO
phrases.cultural_note: The 2nd floor (115m) actually offers the best view of Paris for detail. The summit (276m) gives panoramic views but buildings look smaller. Many locals prefer the 2nd floor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the wait is
phrases.text_local: C'est combien de temps d'attente environ ?
phrases.pronunciation: seh kohm-BYEHN duh tahn dah-TAHNT ahn-vee-ROHN
phrases.cultural_note: Wait times can exceed 2 hours in summer without advance tickets. Visit at night for shorter lines and a magical illuminated Paris.

phrases.text_local: Non merci, ça ne m'intéresse pas.
phrases.pronunciation: nohn mair-SEE, sah nuh mehn-tay-RES pah
phrases.cultural_note: Unofficial sellers around the tower sell miniature Eiffel Towers and trinkets. A polite but firm 'Non merci' is the best response. Don't engage further.
